title: Incidents, Reports, CLI, And Documentation
scope: Implement deterministic scheduled incidents, operations text/JSON reports, expanded CLI options, README updates, final tests, and validation readiness.
inputs: Focused target files named by story packets, expected around src/adeptus_testus/facility.py, src/adeptus_testus/cli.py, tests/test_facility.py, README.md
outputs: bounded story packets for incidents, reports, CLI, docs, and final validation evidence
acceptance_criteria: At least two deterministic incidents exist and are encountered or reported with time, room, name, severity/category, effect, and handling note; incident behavior is covered by tests.
Operations text report includes scenario name, start/end time, rooms visited, timeline, incidents, final needs, and warnings; JSON report output is deterministic if implemented.
CLI preserves --until behavior and supports scenario/report/timeline options; README concisely documents preview, scenarios, graph, incidents, reports, and test command.
suggested_story_boundaries: Operations report text/JSON generation and tests.
Expanded CLI behavior with headless pytest coverage.
README update and final validation evidence story if needed.
non_goals: Do not alter graph/scenario behavior except through reviewed dependency-driven fixes.
Do not add GUI, curses, rich terminal UI, terminal colors, external programs, network, database, randomness, or wall-clock dependence.
Do not create broad cleanup or reconciliation stories unrelated to acceptance criteria.
dependency_summary: Requires m02 graph/scenario behavior so reports and incidents can refer to named scenarios, routes, timeline, and expanded state. Must preserve m01 baseline compatibility.
change_boundary: Expected product files: src/adeptus_testus/facility.py, src/adeptus_testus/cli.py, tests/test_facility.py, README.md.
Package metadata should remain dependency-free unless a reviewed story proves a dependency is necessary.
No installed Adeptus skill changes or prior run artifact rewrites.
test_policy: Story tests should directly verify incident, report, CLI, and docs acceptance criteria. Final validation must run Adeptus MCP syntax and pytest tools.
validation_expectations: Final milestone evidence must include adeptus_pytest(args=["-q"], timeout_seconds=60) with stdin DEVNULL and timed_out false.
Cleanup evidence must show no validation cache/temp artifacts remain outside protected .adeptus/runs artifacts.
context_rules: Lexmechanic reads this contract, intake-summary, and m02 milestone summary only.
Enginseer reads assigned story packet plus focused files listed in that packet.
Any product repair after review or validation failure must route through Enginseer and Inquisitor, not the controller.
